goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Fix static/index.html to add missing element IDs (doc-content, editor elements) and ensure all containers match what JS expects
Implement directory tree rendering (recursive collapsible file browser) and tag cloud rendering with click-to-filter in app.js

children.description: Implement fetchTree() → renderTree() pipeline: fetch /api/tree, build recursive collapsible folder/file DOM nodes in #tree-container, with expand/collapse on folder click
Wire file node clicks to loadDoc(): clicking a .tree-doc calls loadDoc(path), highlights active doc, and auto-expands parent folders to reveal it
Implement fetchTags() → renderTagCloud() pipeline: fetch /api/tags, render .tag-pill spans in #tag-cloud showing tag name and count
Implement click-to-filter: clicking a tag pill fetches /api/tags/{tag} for matching doc paths, re-renders the tree showing only matching files; clicking again clears the filter
Fix backlinks rendering: backend returns [{path, title}] objects but loadDoc treats them as plain strings — update to use bl.path and bl.title
Fix CSS double-padding: .tree-node has padding-left:14px conflicting with .tree-children padding-left:14px — remove the duplicate so tree indentation is correct

tree.description: Implement document display (rendered HTML, metadata, backlinks panel, wiki-link navigation) and search result interaction

children.description: Fix backlinks rendering to handle {path, title} objects from API instead of plain strings
Ensure wiki-link click handler matches the actual HTML attributes emitted by the backend markdown renderer
Verify /api/tags/<tag> endpoint exists in backend; if missing, either add it or refactor toggleTagFilter() to use client-side filtering from cached tree data
Ensure search result click handler uses correct response fields (path, title, snippet) matching the backend /api/search response format

tree.description: Implement inline markdown editor with save functionality (toggle edit mode, textarea with raw markdown, save via POST /api/doc)
Start the Flask server, verify all pages load, test tree/tag/search/doc-view/edit/wiki-link flows end-to-end, fix any remaining issues
